title: Chewy Smoky Portuguese Pretzel Flatbread
description: This nutty and chewy flatbread features pretzels and a smoky flavor, making it a romantic Portuguese dish, and its ingredients are anti-inflammatory friendly. It is perfect for a snack or light meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, smoked paprika, salt, and turmeric.
Add the crushed pretzels, olive oil, garlic, and water to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Roll out the dough into a large rectangle.
Place the dough on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the flatbread for 20 minutes or until it is golden brown.
Remove the flatbread from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Slice the flatbread into strips and serve warm.
